description_long: This is a modern laptop with a large, black, rectangular screen bordered by a slim, light-colored bezel. The base features a distinctive keyboard with a mix of tan and brown keys, some of which are labeled with Cyrillic characters, and a set of geometric, arrow-shaped keys to the right. The palm rest area is spacious, and there is a vented section near the right edge, possibly for cooling. The laptop has a built-in stand at the back, allowing it to remain upright on flat surfaces. The overall design is angular and minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metallic or composite elements for structural support.
description: A light-colored, angular laptop with a large black screen, Cyrillic keyboard, and geometric arrow keys, supported by a rear stand. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full screen, Cyrillic keyboard, geometric arrow keys, and vented section on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile, rear stand, and the keyboard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back panel and the central stand, with no ports or branding visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard, arrow keys, and the vented section, as well as the rear stand.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is Cyrillic, with no visible function row or numeric keypad, and features geometric arrow keys.
